assertions.description: The GH60 is a 60% mechanical keyboard PCB. The analyzer correctly reports: 338 footprints (241 front / 97 back), 231 THT (mechanical key switches) and 101 SMD components, 2 copper layers, 3305 track segments, 179 vias, 7 copper fill zones, 285mm x 94.6mm board outline, and routing_complete=true. These are consistent with a production-ready keyboard PCB.
